Title: Requires the use of reclaimed asphalt pavement
Summary: Requires the use of at least thirty percent reclaimed asphalt pavement for certain construction projects.
LawCode: Add §24, Hway L; add Art 27 Title 34 §§27-3401 & 27-3403, En Con L
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the highway law and the environmental conservation law, in relation to requiring the use of reclaimed asphalt pavement
